store_headline: One-Page WordPress Theme for Bands and Live Artists
store_subheadline: For bands and live artists — releases, tour dates, videos, and merch all on one page
features: One-page scrolling layout for seamless navigation
Built with Elementor page builder for easy customization
Wolf Core plugin with music-specific Elementor widgets
Event listing section with upcoming performances
Video section for music videos and performances
WooCommerce integration for merch and music sales
Social media integration for artist profiles
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Created in 2014 — one of the original one-page music themes with a decade of real-band use
Vintage/indie badge logo and warm sepia tones that feel like a worn tour t-shirt, not a template
The warmest, most human one-page option in the catalog — Notescape is darker, Tune is cleaner
Releases, tour dates, videos, and merch in a single scroll — the complete band presence without multi-page overhead
Live crowd photography hero that puts the audience front and center before the band loads
Elementor-powered for artists who want to customize without rebuilding from scratch
Proven across 10+ years of real band use — receipts, not just promises
key_benefits: Releases, tour dates, videos, and merch in a single-page band presence
Attract audiences who connect with the vintage, lived-in aesthetic templates can't fake
Showcase live energy with crowd photography that puts your audience first
Sell merch in the same scroll as your music without losing momentum
Build on a theme with decade-long real-world band validation
Stand apart from Notescape's drama and Tune's cleanliness with authentic indie warmth
Manage every section of a working band's presence from one Elementor page

testimonials.text: After 10 years of using the Speaker theme, now I had to migrate to the latest version since the website was broken. After some trouble with getting the license in place again, the support was really excellent and made it work again, response within 24hrs. Recommended!
testimonials.author: chrissa007

testimonials.text: Great layout, been using for a band page - only focused on a one-page layout but it works well. Lots of positive comments about the site.
testimonials.author: jaywaltm

testimonials.text: I'll admit it took me a bit of time to understand how the theme worked - partly because I jumped in without reading the documentation. The customer support was helpful and pointed me in the right direction; responses were received within 24 hours. I also appreciate follow-up to confirm that my problems were addressed.
testimonials.author: jlowery
